title: santalodes stenopetalum
intro: Santalodes stenopetalum, also known as the sandalwood tree, is a plant species native to Australia, known for its distinctive sandalwood oil. This oil has been used for centuries in traditional medicine and perfumery, valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and aiding in skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The medicinal properties of Santalodes stenopetalum oil are commonly utilized in herbal preparations, including essential oils, tinctures, and creams, to promote overall well-being and address various health concerns. In addition to its medicinal uses, Santalodes stenopetalum is also prized for its fragrant wood, which is used in traditional perfumery and as a natural incense.
intro_study: According to the study, santalodes stenopetalum (which is actually likely a misnomer and is believed to be the same as Sandoricum koetjape Merr.) benefits include having anti-inflammatory and anticancer properties due to the presence of triterpenes like koetjapic acid.
